description.en: The Japanese spider crab is a deep-sea giant that holds the record for the largest leg span of any arthropod on Earth.
description.zh: 甘氏巨螯蟹（蜘蛛蟹）是一种深海巨兽，保持着地球上所有节肢动物中最大腿跨度的纪录。

anatomy.en: Their leg span can reach an astonishing 3.7 meters from claw to claw! They have an orange body with white spots and a bumpy shell that helps them blend into the rocky ocean floor.
anatomy.zh: 它们两爪展开的跨度可达惊人的3.7米！它们的身体呈橙色，带有白斑，坑坑洼洼的甲壳能帮助它们融入布满岩石的海底。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Despite their terrifying appearance, they are gentle scavengers that slowly walk along the seabed eating dead animals and plants. They are also incredibly long-lived and can survive for up to 100 years.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 尽管外表骇人，但它们是温和的食腐动物，在海底缓慢爬行，捡食死去的动植物。它们也极其长寿，甚至可以活到100岁。

habitat_and_distribution.en: They are found exclusively in the Pacific Ocean around the coasts of Japan. They inhabit deep, cold waters, usually wandering between depths of 50 to 600 meters.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 它们仅分布在环绕日本海岸的太平洋中。它们栖息在寒冷的深水中，通常在50至600米的深处游荡。
